title: Extract trudoc and docs-ui into beskid_web_common submodule

source.subject: chore(docs): move trudoc and docs-ui to beskid_web_common.

body:
Moves `packages/trudoc` and docs-ui sources into `beskid_web_common`, updates site/CI workflows and root `bun.lock` so site, tracker, and nexus consume shared `@beskid/beskid-ui` / trudoc via workspace or submodule.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`a49d2e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/a49d2e9)
- **Subject:** chore(docs): move trudoc and docs-ui to beskid_web_common.
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## What shipped

Moves `packages/trudoc` and docs-ui sources into `beskid_web_common`, updates site/CI workflows and root `bun.lock` so site, tracker, and nexus consume shared `@beskid/beskid-ui` / trudoc via workspace or submodule.
